review_text: Friendly owners, lovely location, sites are quite small, not recommended if your van is over 19ft
Right across road from North Arm of lake. Bit hard to just walk over to beach. Aldi walking nearby. The pub was close and had good fish n chips. Cute little park. Not many sites.
Great location.  Visited in January.  Before we visit next time I hope the wifi has improved.  The amenities block are ok but  looking a bit tired and floors on some shower cubicles need retiling.

So close to the township. My kids made use of the swimming pool even tho it was so windy & cold. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay! Parking across the road is not an issue at all, amenities are good. Showers have great water pressure but goes extremely hot if someone is running the sink taps. Will definately visit again.

Cheers

The manager of this park makes it great. Friendly, helpful and engaging. The spots are tiny and extremely tight but he helps everyone get in safely.
Amazing spot with everything in walking distance.
Put your laundry in super early or really late as staff have machines tied up for the day.
Clean enough amenities, room for improvement but fit for use.
Some of the best caravan park I have ever visited. Managers family are looking after the place like after the own home.
Great stay

Small  van/cabin  park, great  location  across  the  road  from  ocean  inlet and  easy  walk  into  town  and  attractions, van  sites  not  large, very  level  and  most  with  matting. Amenities  oldish  but  clean  and  maintained. Rates  reasonable  for  off  season.  Very  quiet  location, swimming  pool.

This a great little Tourist park, staff are super welcoming, the amenities block are clean , camp kitchen is well appointed location is great water and boats across the road or walk through the motel at the back and you have more water more boats and shopping and restaurants. Fees reasonable , would happily come back here.
Had a site and cabin . Fantastic staff, lovely small park. Short walk to main shopping and shorter walk to Aldi. Will define visit again.
What a great little park . Very helpful staff .nice clean pool . If anyone doesn't have a great stay at this park then caravanning is not for you and stay at a 5 star hotel

We stayed over the long weekend is a small little park but we really enjoyed our stay Cathy and hubby where very welcoming and made us feel at home great location can either go to the town side (through the gate) or across the road to the water and park (5 min walk) places like this makes us want to support small businesses we look foward to coming back 😀  p.s Cathy also owns cathys Asian kitchen and her food is to die for hands down best Asian food around locally.
A clean tidy park right across the road from the estuary. The manager was extremely helpful and very friendly.
Good location, good amenities.
We stayed for a long weekend for The Melbourne Cup holiday. Fabulous location and owners extremely friendly,  however the facilities were disgusting and dirty. We won't stay again.

bad the manager is rude and decides to tell us lies? oh god liar the pool is “heated“ but is as cold as ice. telling us not to make a single noise after 10 or theyll kick you out no matter what? Oh god what is this place. Do not even bother going. find another place.

We stayed here during Melbourne cup weekend. Amenities were so dirty, it was a very busy peak time and yet no cleaning was done. Bins were emptied and toilet paper replaced but that’s it. No mop, wipe down and the showers looked like they have not been cleaned for a long time. Will not recommend or stay here again.
Great place with reasonable prices and a friendly smile

Lovely park, great location to enjoy all of Lakes Entrance best. Opposite water and nice lawns, carataker was friendly and accomodated our 2 sml lap dogs (Conditions: Dogs were not allowed in our cabin). We stayed 1 night only in May 2024 & next time we are in Lakes Entrance would not hesitate to stay here.
Cheep powered sites for caravans in a beautiful little park, close to everything, five minute walk to shops, great spot for a fish, or just take in the sights.
Had a powered site. Small park. Well-maintained. Friendly owners

Small park - would be hard for large vans to park in. Directly across from mooring areas with a mooring spot for your boat if you bring one. Lovely staff.  Swimming pool. Clean facilities.  Dog friendly.
Nice caravan park. Facilities are cleaned, the owner is very friendly. I stay here for a night, close to the city, restaurants and ALDI store.

Pool was really small so is the park but the management is probably could be a bit better the park needs a revamp especially the bathrooms and pool me and my family got confused abut the how old u had to be to swim by yourself because on one poster it said 7 but on a different one it said 12 but in general it’s good
Caravan Park is as big as a postage stamp, they have a drive through that you have to back out ,very disappointing. G'day members.

Lovely clean park, perfect location to enjoy all Lakes Entrance has to offer. Quiet park, pet friendly - our dogs loved their stay.  Cathy is friendly and helpful, very accomodating. Next time we are in Lakes Entrance would not hesitate to stay again.
Have stayed here before units excellent very friendly staff location is great looking over the water
Pleasant owners. Clean facilities
Great location small park friendly managers. Possibly wouldn't stay when it's busy but loved it in off peak.
